sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n8285" key="a)ne/ntatos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀνέν-τᾰτος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n8285.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">without tension</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">force,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0513.tlg001:71" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Theopomp.Com.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">71</biblScope> </bibl>; <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">without over-exertion,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Antyll.</author> </bibl> ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0722.tlg001:6:21:5" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Orib.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.21.5</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
